title: The Secret of Dr. Kildare
writer: Max Brand, Willis Goldbeck, Harry Ruskin
actors: Lew Ayres, Lionel Barrymore, Lionel Atwill
plot: Dr. Gillespie's cancer has gotten worse, and to force him to take a rest instead of pursuing a sulfa-drug/pneumonia study, Kildare refuses to assist Gillespie, and instead accepts a case of hysterical blindness. She's also the dau...
